build.UNIT_TEST: MANUAL: no test runner configured yet — CLAUDE.md plans Vitest + React Testing Library; until then verify with TYPECHECK + LINT and a manual dev-server check

researchLayers.name: components
researchLayers.targets: src/components/, composition, props contracts, styling usage

researchLayers.name: state
researchLayers.targets: src/contexts/, custom hooks, URL-driven state, window events

researchLayers.name: api-types
researchLayers.targets: src/services/api.ts methods, src/types/index.ts shapes, backend contracts, auth/session lifecycle

_notes: Starter profile for a React/Vite TypeScript storefront. Copy to working-docs/config.json and adjust.

The repo's CLAUDE.md is authoritative: functional components + named exports, all backend calls through apiBoundary (src/services/api.ts), typed responses, loading + error states, user-feedback helpers, styling ordering with dark: variants.
When a test runner lands, replace UNIT_TEST with 'npx vitest run' and add it to the ts|tsx mapping.
Set jira.mode to 'mcp' if the Atlassian MCP connector is available in your Claude Code session.
